about blog publications teaching

Tirtharaj Dash

Assistant Professor (Gr-II) & Doctoral Researcher in Machine Learning

D-168

BITS Pilani, K.K. Birla Goa Campus

Zuarinagar, Goa 403726

I am working as an Assistant Professor (Grade-II) at the Department of Computer Science, BITS Pilani Goa Campus. I am also a Doctoral Researcher in Machine Learning at the same department. I am working with Senior Professor Ashwin Srinivasan.

My research is focused on the areas of Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Neuro-Symbolic Models, and Optimisation. My doctoral research focuses on the study of stochastic optimisation to search very large discrete spaces. An application of this study is in the area of Inductive Logic Programming (ILP), which is a subfield of symbolic artificial intelligence. Further, the application of the research extends to neuro-symbolic machine learning, a type of which is a combination of ILP and Deep Neural Networks.

I received M.Tech from VSSUT (Formerly UCE), Burla in the year 2014 and B.Tech from NIST Berhampur in the year 2012. I am a Silver Medalist in both M.Tech and B.Tech for my academic performance.

I have worked as an Assistant Professor at NIST Berhampur for over a year during 2014 - 2015. I have also worked as IASc-INSA-NASI Summer Research Fellow at ISI Kolkata. I have qualified national level competitive examinations such as GATE (thrice) and UGC-NET.

news

Mar 16, 2020 I am in the newspapers for my DST-AWSAR Award: The Goan, Navhind Times, Gomantak Times.
Feb 24, 2020 I won the AWSAR Award 2019 from DST, Govt. of India (Country Rank: 9 in Best-100 Category). Read the story here.
Sep 4, 2019 Our research paper wins Best Student Research Paper Award at ILP-2018.
Best way to reach me is via e-mail.
